# Testing Contract

## Scope

`src/backend/tests/**/*.ts`

## Stack

- Vitest only. No Jest.
- Unit tests: `src/backend/tests/unit/`
- Integration tests: `src/backend/tests/integration/`

## Test Intent

- Unit tests capture domain rules: approval roles, state transitions,
  notification behavior.
- Integration tests document API contracts for routes.
- Placeholder integration tests are acceptable when they clearly describe
  the intended contract.

## Change Rules

- Changing `src/backend/src/rules/` requires updating unit tests first.
- Changing route behavior requires updating integration contract tests.
- Changing frontend behavior that depends on API responses requires verifying
  API types and route tests still match.
